pageTitle.value: Rolex Partnerships - Die Welt's commitments to innovation

pageCaption.value: With its “Perpetual Planet” campaign, Rolex supports extraordinary individuals and organisations carrying out an important task sustaining our planet.

metadescription.value: As part of its Perpetual Planet campaign, Rolex is partnering with Die Welt to support remarkable entrepreneurs and innovators. See more on rolex.org.

text.value: With its “Perpetual Planet” campaign, Rolex supports extraordinary individuals and organisations carrying out an important task sustaining our planet.

pageCaption.value: In the shadow of the world’s highest mountain range there is a drought as rain does not make it past the peaks.

WaPageTitle.value: Overcoming water shortages in the Himalayan deserts

metadescription.value: Sonam Wangchuk, a Rolex Laureate and engineer, mastered a plan to overcome water shortages in the Himalayan deserts. Learn more on rolex.org.

previewTitle.value: Overcoming water shortages in the Himalayan deserts

pageTitle.value: Rolex Partnerships - Protecting rainforests from illegal logging

pageCaption.value: Huge areas of tropical rainforest disappear every day due to illegal logging. This is why Topher White is installing electronic “ears” in the jungle. Made from recycled technology, these work as a networked warning system. He was awarded the Rolex Award for Enterprise for his project.

WaPageTitle.value: He saves forests using old mobile phones

metadescription.value: Using discarded mobile phones, Rolex Awards Associate Laureate Topher White is safeguarding rainforests from illegal logging. Read more on rolex.org.

previewTitle.value: He saves forests using old mobile phones

pageTitle.value: Rolex Partnerships - Perpetual Planet, a commitment to research

pageCaption.value: Rolex Awards for Enterprise honour people who do something special – for our society and our planet. Rolex has been presenting this award for more than 40 years. 150 people have been honoured for ground-breaking, innovative projects.

WaPageTitle.value: That’s why Rolex supports unusual people

metadescription.value: Rolex supports scientists and researchers who are helping preserve our planet and tackle environmental problems. Read more on rolex.org.

previewTitle.value: That’s why Rolex supports unusual people

pageTitle.value: Rolex Partnerships - Honouring exceptional and innovative people

pageCaption.value: Rolex has been supporting expeditions and research projects for a long time. The new “Perpetual Planet” campaign focuses on the urgent question: what do we have to do to make a globally relevant contribution to improving our living conditions and to protect our planet?

metadescription.value: The Rolex Awards for Enterprise support individuals who are contributing to the well-being of humanity and our planet. Read more on rolex.org.

pageTitle.value: Rolex Partnerships - A neuroscientist's fight against paralysis

pageCaption.value: They have lost control over their bodies – but Grégoire Courtine, a neuroscientist, uses pioneering new technology to hand control back to his paraplegic patients. He was consequently awarded the Rolex Award for Enterprise.

metadescription.value: Rolex Laureate and neuroscientist Grégoire Courtine is helping paralysed patients regain their freedom. Discover more on rolex.org.

pageTitle.value: Rolex Partnerships - Miranda Wang's remedy for plastic waste

pageCaption.value: Plastic waste is everywhere - nature has practically no remedy for plastic. This is where technology comes in. Miranda Wang is developing procedures that turn plastic waste into useful raw materials. For this she received the Rolex Award for Enterprise.

WaPageTitle.value: She turns plastic waste into a raw material

metadescription.value: Rolex Laureate Miranda Wang is using technology to transform plastic waste into useful raw materials. Read more on rolex.org.

previewTitle.value: She turns plastic waste into a raw material

The 2019 Rolex National Geographic Explorers of the Year - The Okavango Wilderness Project Team
Fernando Trujillo: For the love of river dolphins
